text: Hello friends, my name is Dr. Vishal Soni and I would be demonstrating a small step of robotic groin hernia repair, the TAP plus technique. The TAP plus technique involves closure of the direct hernia defect with different sutures.

The surgeon uses a 2-0 V-lock barbed absorbable suture to close the hernia defect, starting from the area near the pubic arch and progressing upwards in a continuous fashion without interlocking the sutures.

one needs to be very careful because there are multiple vital structures present in this area and you surely don't want to injure these and create a trouble for yourself so few more running sutures going a little way back to ensure that the whole thing sits snug and well and the final snap
